name: next-compose-page
description: Generate a composed Next.js page from a JSON spec/preset (customizable list/chart/table layout).

options.description: Path to a page spec JSON file.
Page spec preset name from automations/specs/pages (without .json).
Template variable used by presets/fallback spec.
Template variable used by presets/fallback spec.
Default analytics app name used by analytics contract refs.
Overwrite generated page unless a no-auto-update directive is present.
